ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Sep-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Eric Giersch appeared by zoom for Christal and Stevan Dy Foon (co-administrators)

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Stevan Dy Foon and Crystal Dy Foon are appointed as the Co-Administrators of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $257,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
